assertions.assertion: Response explains that third-party authentication handlers need NuGet package updates for the new .NET version
assertions.rationale: General knowledge that auth packages need framework-compatible versions

assertions.assertion: Response specifically mentions WS-Federation handler needing an update
assertions.rationale: WS-Federation is a well-known auth handler that would need updating

assertions.assertion: Response mentions SAML2P handler (Sustainsys.Saml2 or equivalent) needing a compatible version for .NET 8+
assertions.rationale: SAML2P handlers like Sustainsys are well-known and would obviously need compatible versions

assertions.assertion: Response recommends testing all external login flows end-to-end after migration
assertions.rationale: While good advice, it may not be consistently and explicitly stated as a recommendation
